contract_clauses.text: The ACO's quality performance shall be evaluated across the following measures, each weighted equally at 20% of the composite score.
contract_clauses.section: Evaluating 5 quality measures with equal weighting. Data conflict resolution: most recent clinical.
contract_clauses.title: QUAL-1.0

code_references.logic_summary: Run each enabled quality measure (HEDIS methodology: denominator → exclusions → numerator → rate). Compute weighted composite score across all measures.
